data.title: Feedback PLC Sees Notable Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Feedback (GB:FDBK) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Feedback PLC has reported a change in its voting rights, as Spreadex LTD now holds 1.66% of voting rights through financial instruments, down from a previous 5.46%. This update reflects a significant shift in the investor’s stake in the company, which may impact its market dynamics and investor sentiment.

data.title: Mitchells & Butlers Directors Engage in Share Transactions
data.description:
Mitchells & Butlers (GB:MAB) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Mitchells & Butlers directors Phil Urban and Tim Jones, along with PDMR Andrew Freeman, have engaged in share transactions as part of the company’s Short Term Deferred Incentive Plan. On December 6, 2024, shares vested for these individuals, with some sold to cover taxes and National Insurance, while the rest were retained in line with the company’s remuneration policy. These transactions reflect the company’s commitment to its shareholding policies and transparency in managerial share dealings.

For further insights into GB:MAB stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Spreadex LTD Gains Influence in Feedback PLC
data.description:
Feedback (GB:FDBK) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Feedback PLC has seen a significant shift in its voting rights structure following Spreadex LTD’s acquisition of financial instruments. The transaction, which took place in late November, has resulted in Spreadex controlling 5.4648% of the voting rights through CFDs and spread betting. This move could potentially influence Feedback PLC’s future decisions and strategies, garnering attention from stock market enthusiasts.

For further insights into GB:FDBK stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Incredible Holdings Ltd Announces Key Administrative Changes
data.description:
Incredible Holdings Ltd. (SG:RDR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Incredible Holdings Ltd has announced the resignation of their Company Secretary, Ms. Foo Soon Soo, and the cessation of KCK CorpServe Pte Ltd as their share registrar, effective December 6, 2024. The company’s register of members will now be maintained at their registered office in Singapore. They are in the process of identifying candidates to fill these vacancies and will announce the appointments once finalized.

data.title: Wai Yuen Tong Announces Registrar Change for 2025
data.description:
Wai Yuen Tong Medicine Holdings Limited (HK:0897) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Wai Yuen Tong Medicine Holdings Limited has announced a change in its Bermuda principal share registrar and transfer agent to Appleby Global Corporate Services (Bermuda) Limited, effective January 1, 2025. The Hong Kong branch share registrar remains with Tricor Investor Services Limited. This move is part of the company’s administrative updates to streamline its operations.

data.title: CAP-XX Ltd Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
CAP-XX Ltd (GB:CPX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

CAP-XX Limited, a leading innovator in supercapacitor technology, has announced its Annual General Meeting (AGM) set for January 13, 2025. The meeting will be accessible to shareholders both in-person in Australia and online through the Investor Meet Company platform. CAP-XX is renowned for its high-power, space-efficient supercapacitors, which are increasingly used in various sectors, including consumer electronics and automotive industries.

data.title: DBS Group Unveils New Senior Leadership Appointments
data.description:
DBS Group Holdings (SG:D05) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

DBS Group Holdings has announced key senior-level appointments effective January 1, 2025, as part of its leadership strategy. Han Kwee Juan will become the new Group Head of Institutional Banking, while Lim Him Chuan will take over as Singapore Country Head. These changes follow Tan Su Shan’s elevation to Group CEO in March 2025, demonstrating DBS’s commitment to nurturing internal talent.

For further insights into SG:D05 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: TSH Resources Bhd. Executes Strategic Share Buyback
data.description:
TSH Resources Bhd. (SG:TSH) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

TSH Resources Bhd. has executed a share buyback, purchasing 320,000 shares at prices ranging from MYR 1.190 to MYR 1.200, totaling MYR 385,804.96. These shares are retained in treasury, increasing the company’s treasury shares to 2,179,000, which represents 0.15769% of total issued shares. This strategic move might interest investors monitoring TSH’s financial maneuvers and its effects on stock value.

data.title: COFCO Joycome Foods Reports Steady Pork Business Growth
data.description:
COFCO Joycome Foods Limited (HK:1610) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

COFCO Joycome Foods Limited reported its unaudited operating data for November 2024, highlighting a hog production volume of 329,000 heads and fresh pork sales volume of 25,800 tons. The company showed a steady increase in its branded fresh pork revenue as a percentage of total fresh pork revenue, reaching 31.67%. Investors are advised to approach COFCO Joycome Foods’ shares with caution as these figures are subject to adjustments and final confirmation.

For further insights into HK:1610 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
